meaning: adj.酸的,发酵的,酸腐的,酸味的
examples: The heat turned the milk sour.
Too much pulp produces a sour wine.
The stewed apple was sour even with honey.
Venture folks have seen a market across the board turn sour on them before.
And then there is Sour Flour, a community-focused bakeshop in the Mission District.
